children.heading: .—Submittal of Information by Educational Institutions
children.label: a .—Submittal of Information by Educational Institutions
children.text: As a condition of approval under chapter 36 of this title of a course offered by an educational institution (as defined in ), each year, each educational institution (as so defined) that received a payment in that year on behalf of an individual entitled to educational assistance under this chapter shall submit to the Secretary such information regarding the academic progress of the individual as the Secretary may require.section 3452 of this title

children.heading: .—Reports to Congress
children.label: b .—Reports to Congress
children.text: Not later than March 1 of each year, the Secretary shall submit to Congress a report that includes a summary of the information provided by educational institutions under subsection (a) for the calendar year preceding the year during which such report is submitted.
